message:
chore: remove deprecated State.IsActive(), inline at call sites

IsActive() was identical to IsWorking() (both return s == StateWorking).
Inlined the check at the two production callers in rig.go and polecat.go,
then removed the function and its duplicate tests.

Part of GHI #1170 deprecation cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
